creator: ebrandi@fugspbr.org
text:
Hi,

Im sending attached a Brazilian Portuguese version of fdp-primer book, translated by The FreeBSD Brazilian Portuguese Documentation Project (http://doc.fug.com.br)

Attached file must be uncompressed inside head/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/books directory, patch file must be moved to head/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/share and applied with "patch -Np0 < pt_BR.ISO8859-1_share_sgml.patch"

Thks

Edson Brandi

Ps: If you have problems to uudecode attached file, you can download tgz file from following url: http://server05.ebrandi.eti.br/pt_BR/books/fdp-primer-pt_BR.ISO8859-1.tgz
